name: codex-coordinator
description: Independent repository-scoped coordination for safe parallel and cross-task Codex work.

interface.longDescription: An independent third-party plugin that coordinates Codex tasks inside one repository with lazy enablement, explicit opt-out, local ownership, exact routing, safe shared-checkout boundaries, and restart recovery.
defaultPrompt: Create the tasks needed and coordinate this goal: <goal>
Show who is working on what and what is blocked
Turn Codex Coordinator off for this repository
